insights.body: Royal Challengers Bangalore scored at 8.82 runs per over in overs 16–20, 24% dots in that phase.

insights.title: Toss winner took the match
insights.body: Royal Challengers Bangalore won the toss, chose to field, and won. Dataset average: toss winner wins ~51% of IPL games.
